text_block_list.text:
Gold City doesn't feel well, so I take her to the
infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I'm going to close my eyes for a
second. I'll set an alarm, just in case.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: AAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whew, what a roller coaster! I haven't screamed
like that in a while!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back! Hope you have a great time in the
amusement park of your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, what next? There's teacups, or the
pirate adventures...

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
Might I also recommend a gourmet tour? Take a
look at our brochure!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Sounds like a good idea.
BEEP! BEEP! BEEP! BEEP!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Agh! Geez, what is that?! It's so loud!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It sounds like... my alarm clock?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! That's right! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
The parade will be starting soon! Why don't you
stay and enjoy a little more?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know. I was having fun.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But having fun isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Because... I have to run!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? It was just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heheh. "I have to run," huh? Yeah, that's right!

Gold City regains her energy and hops right back
in to her training.

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Attention, customers. We would like to make an
apology.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The alert you just heard was triggered by our
maintenance staff to test the system. We
apologize for any inconvenience caused.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay... I guess I'll go to the next ride.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, I've overslept!

Gold City seems disappointed she overslept well
past her schedule.
